name: Apple Knight: Farmers Market
author: Poki
description: Apple Knight: Farmers Market is an idle game where you get to run your own market in a charming blocky world! Start by picking apples from trees, displaying them, and selling them to your customers. Use the money you earn to expand your market and add more items like corn or eggs. Ride a horse to speed up your tasks and boost your efficiency! Hire helpers to assist you with various duties. Are you ready to grow your market and become the ultimate market master? How to play Apple Knight: Farmers Market? Move: WASD or arrow keys Who created Apple Knight: Farmers Market? Apple Knight: Farmers Market is created by Limitless. Play their other game on Poki: Apple Knight , Apple Knight: Fight , Apple Knight: Mini Dungeons , Apple Knight Golf and Viking Village ! How can I play Apple Knight: Farmers Market for free? You can play Apple Knight: Farmers Market for free on Poki. Can I play Apple Knight: Farmers Market on mobile devices and desktop? Apple Knight: Farmers Market can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
